mapper.select: SELECT * FROM consult_record WHERE deleted = 0 AND answer IS NULL AND reply_time IS NULL AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, create_time, NOW()) >= #{slaMinutes} ORDER BY create_time ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE consult_record SET sla_exceeded = 1 WHERE deleted = 0 AND answer IS NULL AND reply_time IS NULL AND sla_exceeded = 0 AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, create_time, NOW()) >= #{slaMinutes}
UPDATE consult_record SET answer = #{answer}, is_auto = #{isAuto}, reply_time = #{replyTime}, sla_exceeded = 0 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
